apps.name: Voicy
apps.subtitle: Private Voice Notes with AI
apps.versionDescription: Initial release - Voice recording, AI transcription, summaries, Ask AI, translation in 100+ languages.
apps.localizedDescription: Voicy is a private, AI-powered voice notes app. Record unlimited voice notes and meetings, get AI summaries and to-do lists, ask AI questions across all your notes, and translate in 100+ languages. All data stays on your device. No subscriptions, no tracking.

permissions.usageDescription: Voicy uses the microphone to record voice notes.
Voicy uses Face ID to secure your notes.

privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Voicy needs microphone access to record voice notes.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Voicy uses Face ID to secure your notes.
